stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Aberdeen (EGPD) 10-1V chart from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. 
You are approaching EGPD from the west at Insch via the entry point Inverurie Lane. How should you proceed?

options.a: Fly above 2000 ft and maintain the railway on your right.
options.b: Do not fly above 2000 ft and follow the railway with it on your left.
options.c: Maintain 3000 ft and fly direct to the airfield.
options.d: Follow the railway on your left and maintain 2500 ft.
